name: Lemon, Lime, Orange or Lemon-Lime Mustard
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Fresh lemon, lime or orange juice
Grated zest of lemon, lime or orange peel
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a medium bowl.
2. Transfer the mixture to a jar with a tight-fitting lid.
3. Store in a cool dark place for 2 weeks, then refrigerate.
Makes 2 tablespoons per serving
